meanings.definition: the act of providing approval and support
examples: his vigorous backing of the conservatives got him in trouble with progressives

meanings.definition: something forming a back that is added for strengthening
financial resources provided to make some project possible
examples: the foundation provided support for the experiment
He plumped for the Labor Party
The car backed up and hit the tree

meanings.definition: give support or one's approval to

examples: back the car into the parking spot
I'm betting on the new horse
Can you back up your claims?

meanings.definition: strengthen by providing with a back or backing
